channel.title: GitHub 热门日报
channel.description: 每天一份 GitHub Trending 中文精选

item.title: koala73/worldmonitor
item.description: 待翻译：Real-time global intelligence dashboard. AI-powered news aggregation, geopolitical monitoring, and infrastructure tracking in a unified situational awareness interface
item.category: DevOps, 可观测性, 可视化

item.title: ruvnet/RuView
item.description: 待翻译：π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.

item.title: ayghri/i-have-adhd
item.description: 待翻译：A skill for your coding agent to stop it from burying the answer. ADHD-friendly output.

item.title: schollz/croc
item.description: 待翻译：Easily and securely send things from one computer to another 🐊 📦

item.title: likec4/likec4
item.description: 待翻译：Visualize, collaborate, and evolve the software architecture with always actual and live diagrams from your code

item.title: chrislgarry/Apollo-11
item.description: 待翻译：Original Apollo 11 Guidance Computer (AGC) source code for the command and lunar modules.

item.title: jamiepine/voicebox
item.description: 待翻译：The open-source AI voice studio. Clone, dictate, create.

item.title: diegosouzapw/OmniRoute
item.description: 待翻译：Never stop coding. Free MIT AI gateway: one endpoint, 278+ providers (90+ free), 500+ models — Kimi, Claude, GPT, OpenAI, Gemini, GLM, DeepSeek, MiniMax. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenCode, Cline & Copilot. Quota-aware auto-fallback, RTK+Caveman compression saves 15-95% tokens, MCP/A2A, Desktop/PWA. Built by 500+ contributors

item.title: shiyu-coder/Kronos
item.description: 待翻译：Kronos: A Foundation Model for the Language of Financial Markets

item.title: ComposioHQ/awesome-claude-skills
item.description: 待翻译：A curated list of awesome Claude Skills, resources, and tools for customizing Claude AI workflows
item.category: skills, 自动化, 学习资源

item.title: oblien/openship
item.description: 待翻译：Self-hosted deployment platform

item.title: agegr/pi-web
item.description: 待翻译：Web UI for the pi coding agent

item.title: rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch
item.description: 待翻译：Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.

item.title: tirth8205/code-review-graph
item.description: 待翻译：Local-first code intelligence graph for MCP and CLI. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so AI coding tools read only what matters, with benchmarked context reductions on reviews and large-repo workflows.
item.category: AI代理, 评估, 开发者工具, 可视化, 自动化

item.title: dreamhunter2333/cloudflare_temp_email
item.description: 待翻译：CloudFlare free temp domain email 免费收发 临时域名邮箱 支持附件 IMAP SMTP TelegramBot

item.title: DioxusLabs/dioxus
item.description: 待翻译：Fullstack app framework for web, desktop, and mobile.

item.title: hyprwm/Hyprland
item.description: 待翻译：Hyprland is an independent, highly customizable, dynamic tiling Wayland compositor that doesn't sacrifice on its looks.

item.title: Pumpkin-MC/Pumpkin
item.description: 待翻译：Empowering everyone to host fast and efficient Minecraft servers.

item.title: dottxt-ai/outlines
item.description: 待翻译：Structured Outputs
